name: sarfis
description: SARFIS - Smart Accounting & Real-time Financial Intelligence System

scripts.install-all: npm run install-backend && npm run install-saas-admin && npm run install-frontend
scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm run install-all && npm run build-frontend
scripts.build: npm run install-all && npm run build-frontend
scripts.migrate: cd backend && npx knex migrate:latest --env production
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
